name: wxcode-admin-vault-treasury
title: Vault Admin
description: Deep-navy / amber-gold admin aesthetic: #0a0f1e canvas, raised navy panels (#121a2e / #1b2640), amber-gold accent (#f59e0b), cool-navy neutral ramp, Inter tabular figures, signed-amount rows (green / red), 8–10px radii. Archetype = labeled 220px rail nav with grouped sections + 60px topbar (entity switcher + period tabs + avatar) + 4 KPI cards with inline sparklines + 2-column (7fr area chart / 5fr allocation donut) + full-width records table with status pills, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for calm, high-clarity operational consoles that communicate magnitude at a glance.

query.en: Apply this deep navy amber-gold admin aesthetic to my domain — labeled rail nav, entity/period switcher, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, area chart + allocation donut, and a dense records table with signed amounts and status pills, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个深海军蓝琥珀金管理界面风格应用到我的领域：带标签的侧边导航栏、实体/周期切换器、4 个带迷你图的 KPI 卡片、面积图 + 分配圆环图，以及带有正负金额和状态标签的密集记录表格，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
